summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Reco column editability based on variance_mode. 13/13 frontend tests PASSED. 11/11 backend tests PASSED. The implementation correctly restricts Reco column editing to the PRIMARY report type matching the session's variance_mode (bin-wise=Detailed, barcode-wise=Barcode, article-wise=Article). Non-primary report types do NOT show the Reco column.
critical_code_review_comments: Code correctly implements isRecoEditable prop based on variance_mode: DetailedTable gets Reco when variance_mode=bin-wise, BarcodeWiseTable gets Reco when variance_mode=barcode-wise, ArticleWiseTable gets Reco when variance_mode=article-wise
The Reco subtitle text 'Click the Reco column to adjust quantities...' correctly only appears when isRecoEditable is true
Bin-wise Summary and Category Summary tables correctly NEVER have Reco columns
Individual sessions (not consolidated) correctly do NOT have Reco or Final Qty columns
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data (Reliance Retail client with bin-wise, barcode-wise, and article-wise sessions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reco editability based on variance_mode is fully implemented and tested. The key logic is in lines 916-921 of PortalReports.jsx where isRecoEditable prop is computed as isConsolidatedView && sessionInfo?.variance_mode === 'xxx'. Individual sessions never have Reco editing. Consolidated view determines primary variance_mode from the most common mode among client's sessions.

test_scenarios: 1_detailed_binwise_has_reco: PASS - Detailed table (bin-wise consolidated) has Reco column (editable)
2_detailed_binwise_has_final_qty: PASS - Detailed table has Final Qty column
3_barcode_binwise_no_reco_subtitle: PASS - Barcode table (bin-wise mode) does NOT have Reco subtitle
4_barcode_binwise_no_reco_header: PASS - Barcode table (bin-wise mode) does NOT have Reco header
5_barcode_has_final_qty: PASS - Barcode table has Final Qty column
6_individual_barcode_no_reco: PASS - Individual barcode session has NO Reco
7_individual_no_final_qty: PASS - Individual session has NO Final Qty
9_category_no_reco_subtitle: PASS - Category Summary has NO Reco subtitle
10_category_no_reco_header: PASS - Category Summary has NO Reco header
11_category_consolidated_has_final_qty: PASS - Category Summary (consolidated) has Final Qty
12_binwise_summary_no_reco_subtitle: PASS - Bin-wise Summary has NO Reco subtitle
13_binwise_summary_no_reco_header: PASS - Bin-wise Summary has NO Reco header
14_binwise_summary_consolidated_has_final_qty: PASS - Bin-wise Summary (consolidated) has Final Qty

features_verified.consolidated_bin-wise_detailed_has_reco: PASS - Detailed table SHOULD have Reco (editable) when variance_mode=bin-wise
features_verified.consolidated_bin-wise_barcode_no_reco: PASS - Barcode table should NOT have Reco when variance_mode=bin-wise
features_verified.consolidated_bin-wise_article_no_reco: PASS - Article table should NOT have Reco when variance_mode=bin-wise
features_verified.consolidated_bin_summary_no_reco: PASS - Bin-wise Summary NEVER has Reco
features_verified.consolidated_category_summary_no_reco: PASS - Category Summary NEVER has Reco
features_verified.individual_session_no_reco: PASS - Individual sessions NEVER have Reco column
features_verified.individual_session_no_final_qty: PASS - Individual sessions NEVER have Final Qty column
features_verified.consolidated_final_qty_shown: PASS - Final Qty shown in all consolidated views
features_verified.reco_subtitle_only_when_editable: PASS - 'Click the Reco column...' only appears when isRecoEditable=true
